reviews.review_description: Nice game please make it adeptive like if some one playing good increase complexity but if someone playing bad decrease so that one does not give up on app, also suggesting force bars colour on side should be customisable. More ships and little variation on map is also welcome. Over all good app, I know I am too late on this party.😄

Nice aesthetics - there's a slight variety to levels which change every few checkpoints or so. I do go back to this game from time to time to have a quick run and see if I can beat my score. 

BTW not sure if leaderboard is working correctly.

developer_response.body: Thanks przecinek! "BTW not sure if leaderboard is working correctly."- could you specify that issue (contact@deficit-games.de)? That would be great. * Edit: Fixed with 3.1

reviews.review_title: tunnel games are the new platformer
reviews.review_description: it just works. this and smash hit are great

I love this idea of an Oculus go exclusive. The game looks and plays amazing, crisp graphics and smooth frame rate. Maybe in the future we can select different levels? Or not! The the brutal difficulty is also part of the fun.

If you die it is totally your fault. This game is highly challenging but it’s not because of finicky controls. It’s because of the fast pace walls coming at you from all angles in pretty well done VR. This game has pinpoint accurate turning and it’s a really fun game to play. Easy to pick up but will take time to master. I highly recommend the purchase.

reviews.review_title: Puts your reflexes to the test
reviews.review_description: A challenging and fun game. It takes a few tries to get accustomed to the speed and when to rotate but the great controls make it a fun experience. Reaching a better score and new areas feels rewarding and the soundtrack is also very enjoyable.
the game is fun great graphics has great use of the 3dof controller  its one of thoose just one more go games then you realize hrs have gone

Great game with visuals to match but VERY HARD! It would be great to have the option to continue at least 2-3 times before restarting from the beginning when you die because YOU WILL DIE A LOT! Easy to control but difficult to master!

developer_response.body: Thanks Stevorama! Try to hit speedramps and the uprgrades. And try to hit a speedramp when you are in the "powermode" (after collecting one of those little energypacks). You will get rewarded! Best, Andi / DEFICIT Games

reviews.review_description: Fast paced game.  Fun to play.
